what: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data
title: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data
text: castform package used download hourly weather station data Environment Canada. Data stored .csv files. various functions : Download latest station inventory list Download single hourly data file Download multiple hourly data files Download data files province/territory Download data files year range Download available hourly station files Search available stations province year range

title: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data
text: can install development version castform GitHub :

title: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data
text: needs FIRST STEP analysis. Download latest station inventory list using get_metadata(). function download latest station inventory list store new version .csv .rda file. Whenever function run, also load station list global environment Hourly_station_info.

title: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data
text: Examples use code function
code: library(castform) get_single_station_file(station_name =  "discovery island",                         station_id = 27226,                         year = 1997,                         month = 1,                         root_folder = "station_data")                          get_multiple_station_files(station_name = "discovery island",                            station_id = 27226,                            number_of_files = 10,                            year = 1997,                            month = 1,                            parallel_threshold = 50,                            root_folder = "station_data")                             province_station_files(province = "prince edward island",                        year = 1980,                        month = "february",                        parallel_threshold = 50,                        root_folder = "station_data")                         year_range_station_files(station_name = "discovery island",                          station_id = 27226,                          start_year = 1997,                          end_year = 1999,                          parallel_threshold = 50,                          root_folder = "station_data")                           get_all_files()  station_lookup(province = "prince edward island",                 start_year = 1980,                 end_year = 2020)

what: castform: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data — castform
title: castform: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data — castform
text: Downloads hourly weather station data (csv files) Environment Canada.

title: castform: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data — castform
text: get_metadata: Downloads loads latest station inventory metadata (RUN FIRST) get_single_station_file: primary function download one hourly data file. get_multiple_station_files: Downloads multiple hourly data files. province_station_files: Downloads data files province. year_range_station_files: Downloads data files year range. get_all_files: Downloads data files hourly data available. station_lookup: Search available station data province year range.

title: castform: Download Environment Canada Weather Station Data — castform
text: Maintainer: Shawn Yip shawniceyip@trentu.ca

what: Get All Hourly Station Files — get_all_files
title: Get All Hourly Station Files — get_all_files
text: Downloads Environment Canada data stations hourly data available.

title: Get All Hourly Station Files — get_all_files
Get All Hourly Station Files — get_all_files
text: root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory. HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata

title: Download Station Metadata — get_metadata
text: Download latest station inventory list Environment Canada. download latest .csv file needs loaded FIRST ensure functions data work . automatically load latest station inventory global environment `HLY_Station_Info.` past data file needs used, change `HLY_station_info` parameter within function.

title: Get Multiple Station Files — get_multiple_station_files
text: Downloads multiple weather station files Environment Canada

title: Get Multiple Station Files — get_multiple_station_files
code: get_multiple_station_files(   station_name = NULL,   station_id = NULL,   number_of_files = NULL,   year = NULL,   month = NULL,   parallel_threshold = 50,   root_folder = "station_data",   HLY_station_info = NULL )

title: Get Multiple Station Files — get_multiple_station_files
text: station_name Character: name weather station interest. station_id Numeric Integer: unique station ID weather station interest. number_of_files Numeric Integer: number files user wishes download. year Numeric Integer: year data pull. left empty, default first year data collection particular station. month Numeric Integer: month data pull (1 - 12). left empty, default January (1). parallel_threshold Numeric Integer: required number files trigger parallel downloads. left unchanged, parallelization occur downloads 50 files . root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory. HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata

title: Get Single Station File — get_single_station_file
text: Downloads single weather station file Environment Canada

title: Get Single Station File — get_single_station_file
code: get_single_station_file(   station_name = NULL,   station_id = NULL,   year = NULL,   month = NULL,   root_folder = "station_data",   HLY_station_info = NULL )

title: Get Single Station File — get_single_station_file
text: station_name Character: name weather station interest. station_id Numeric Integer: unique station ID weather station interest. year Numeric Integer: year data pull. left empty, default first year data collection particular station. month Numeric Integer: month data pull (1 - 12). left empty, default January (1). root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory. HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata

title: Province Station Files — province_station_files
text: Download Environment Canada weather station files province.

title: Province Station Files — province_station_files
code: province_station_files(   province = NULL,   year = NULL,   month = NULL,   parallel_threshold = 50,   root_folder = "station_data",   HLY_station_info = NULL )

title: Province Station Files — province_station_files
text: province Character: province territory interest. year Numeric Integer: year data pull. left empty, default first year data collection particular station. month Numeric Integer: month data pull (1 - 12). left empty, default January (1). parallel_threshold Numeric Integer: required number files trigger parallel downloads. left unchanged, parallelization occur downloads 50 files . root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory. HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata

title: Station Look-Up — station_lookup
text: Search Canadian weather stations hourly data filtering province year range. Users can search single parameter combination multiple.

title: Station Look-Up — station_lookup
code: station_lookup(   province = NULL,   start_year = NULL,   end_year = NULL,   HLY_station_info = NULL )

title: Station Look-Up — station_lookup
text: province Character. Canadian province territory interest. start_year Numeric Integer. start year data pull. end_year Numeric Integer. end year data pull HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata

what: Download Stations by Year Range — year_range_station_files
title: Download Stations by Year Range — year_range_station_files
text: Downloads multiple weather station files collected specified time period Environment Canada

title: Download Stations by Year Range — year_range_station_files
code: year_range_station_files(   station_name = NULL,   station_id = NULL,   start_year = NULL,   end_year = NULL,   parallel_threshold = 50,   root_folder = "station_data",   HLY_station_info = NULL )

title: Download Stations by Year Range — year_range_station_files
text: station_name Character: name weather station interest. station_id Numeric Integer: unique station ID weather station interest. start_year Numeric Integer: start year data pull. left empty, default first year data collection particular station. end_year Numeric Integer: end year data pull. left empty, default downloading one year data start_year parallel_threshold Numeric Integer: required number files trigger parallel downloads. left unchanged, parallelization occur downloads 50 files . root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory. HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata
